title: Extracting Customer Purchase Histories from Unstructured Social Media Text
scenario: Write a prompt to extract customer purchase histories from unstructured social media text. The text may contain multiple mentions of products, prices, and purchase dates. The target LLM output should be a list of JSON objects, each representing a customer's purchase history. Ensure the extracted data is accurate and up-to-date.
constraints: Must use named entity recognition to identify products and prices

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify the accuracy of the extracted customer purchase histories in the JSON output.
Check if the generated JSON output meets the constraints and requirements.
Check if the generated JSON output accurately identifies products and prices using named entity recognition.
